metadata.note: Curated ~100-row subset. Each row carries the PRECOMPUTED max-pooled SAE latents (lat_idx/lat_val, sparse) and the mean-pooled residual (resid, 2304-d) for its target token span, so the downstream method runs without a GPU.

def reverse(string, output = ""):
    if string == "":
        print "winner: ", output
        return output
    output = output + string[-1]
    string = string[:-1]
    reverse(string, output=output)

And here is what happens when I run it:

winner:  o
